_schema: 6-beat structure per CLAUDE.md law 5. ALL text below is scratch placeholder awaiting Director wording (law 6).

intro_retail.speaker: roy
intro_retail.text: Let's find you something that'll fit the budget.

intro_respect.speaker: roy
intro_respect.text:
Alright.

Let's skip the sales pitch.

What are you actually looking for?

intro.speaker: roy
intro.text: [Situation — Big Roy, loud and friendly, steering you toward a 'one-owner' baler out front before you've said a word.]

options.text: [Mechanic option — look past the fresh paint and read the machine's real condition.]
options.label: [Mechanic]

options.text: [BLANK P-ME — perk option (Stethoscope Ear): the player hears something in a machine on Roy's lot that Roy hasn't caught yet, and says so. Awaiting Director.]
options.label: [Stethoscope Ear]

options.text: [Ask prices, keep your hands in your pockets.]
[Leave before he starts a sentence with 'friend'.]

lemon_spotted.speaker: roy
lemon_spotted.text: [Result — you name the cracked block from ten feet. Roy drops the act; wrench respect. Better machines come out next visit.]

lemon_missed.speaker: roy
lemon_missed.text: [Good failure — you nodded along at the wrong part. Roy files you under 'retail'. Prices quietly firm up for you.]

machine_read.speaker: roy
machine_read.text: [BLANK P-ME-R — Roy stops mid-pitch, listens, hears it too. A professional just saved him a warranty headache. Awaiting Director.]

browse.speaker: roy
browse.text: [Flavor — one machine, one price, one line of salesmanship you can walk away from.]
